short: A 1.5‑point churn drop (5% → 3.5%) adds 14 months runway to a $13.9K MRR bootstrapped SaaS. Want proof it’s not fluff? See the four tactics that actually move the needle. https://saastools.corenk.com/articles/would-reduce-saas-churn-rate
title: Would These Churn Tactics Actually Reduce SaaS Churn Rate, or Just Burn Your Runway?
